signals.raw:
US Begins Naval Blockade of Iranian Ports; Trump Warns of Eliminating Iranian Attack Ships | NO | HIGH confidence**  
President Donald Trump has enacted a US naval blockade on Iran's ports and coastal areas, effective immediately, with declarations that any Iranian fast attack ships approaching US vessels will be eliminated; Tehran vows retaliation.[1]

signals.headline: Germany Inflation Surges to 2
signals.raw:
Germany Inflation Surges to 2.7% in March 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**
Germany's annual inflation rate jumped to 2.7% in March 2026, accelerating sharply from 1.9% in February and marking the highest level since January 2024[3]. The increase was primarily driven by a 7.2% spike in energy prices, with fuel costs rising 20% and heating oil surging 44.4%[3].
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?

signals.headline: South Korea Inflation Rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea Inflation Rises to 2.16% in March 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**
South Korea's annual inflation rate climbed to 2.16% in March 2026, up from 2.0% in February, though it fell short of market forecasts of 2.4%[1][2]. This represents a slight acceleration but remains relatively modest.

signals.raw:
Forecast: South Korea Inflation Expected at 2.6% by Q2 2026 End | MED confidence**
Trading Economics projects South Korea's inflation rate to reach 2.60% by the end of the second quarter, with longer-term expectations of approximately 2.0% in 2027[2].
